intro: Arenaria phitosiana, also known as Phitos' sandwort, is a rare, perennial plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) native to Greece. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in soothing digestive issues and reducing oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Arenaria phitosiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
